channel.title: Kong Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Kong Inc. (kong).

item.title: CVE-2025-1087 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Arbitrary Code Execution in Kong Insomnia Desktop Application
item.description: Kong Insomnia Desktop Application before 11.0.2 contains a template injection vulnerability that allows attackers to execute arbitrary code. The vulnerability exists due to insufficient validation of user-supplied input when processing template strin…
